mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job ( id, parent_job_id, root_job_id, recursion_depth, original_request, goal_summary, status, policy_json, effective_policy_snapshot, effective_policy_hash, agent_profile_id, conversation_id, source_message_id, template_id, template_version, subagent_profile_id, subagent_profile_version, version ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{context.parentJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, COALESCE( #{context.rootJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ), #{context.recursionDepth}, #{originalRequest}, #{goalSummary}, #{status}, JSON_OBJECT('providerId', #{providerId}), JSON_OBJECT('providerId', #{providerId}), LOWER(SHA2(CAST(JSON_OBJECT('providerId', #{providerId}) AS CHAR), 256)), #{context.agentProfileId}, #{context.conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{context.sourceMessageId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{context.templateId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{context.templateVersion}, #{context.subagentProfileId}, #{context.subagentProfileVersion}, 0 )

INSERT INTO task ( id, job_id, task_key, sequence_no, title, goal, task_type, status, execution_mode, contract_json, version ) VALUES ( #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskKey}, #{sequenceNo}, #{title}, #{goal}, 'GENERAL', #{status}, #{executionMode}, JSON_OBJECT( 'version', 1, 'completionPolicy', JSON_OBJECT('requireEvidence', TRUE) ), 0 )

INSERT INTO task_dependency ( task_id, depends_on_task_id, dependency_type ) VALUES ( #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{dependsOnTaskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, 'HARD' )

INSERT INTO runtime_event ( id, job_id, task_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload_json, sequence_no ) VALUES ( #{eventId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, 'JOB', #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{eventType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), 1 )

INSERT INTO outbox_event (id, event_type, payload_json, status) VALUES ( #{eventId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{eventType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), 'PENDING' )
mapper.sql: BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(parent_job_id) AS parentJobId, BIN_TO_UUID(root_job_id) AS rootJobId, recursion_depth AS recursionDepth, original_request AS originalRequest, goal_summary AS goalSummary, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(policy_json, '$.providerId')), 'fake' ) AS providerId, status, BIN_TO_UUID(template_id) AS templateId, template_version AS templateVersion, subagent_profile_id AS subagentProfileId, subagent_profile_version AS subagentProfileVersion, ( SELECT template_key FROM task_graph_template template WHERE template.id = template_id AND template.version = template_version ) AS templateKey, version, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM job WHERE parent_job_id = #{parentJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at
SELECT FROM job WHERE parent_job_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(job.id) AS jobId, BIN_TO_UUID(job.conversation_id) AS conversationId, BIN_TO_UUID(job.source_message_id) AS sourceMessageId, job.version AS version FROM job WHERE job.status = 'CREATED' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task WHERE task.job_id = job.id AND task.status = 'READY' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task JOIN task_run run ON run.task_id = task.id WHERE task.job_id = job.id ) ORDER BY job.created_at LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job WHERE parent_job_id IS NULL

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(task.id) AS id, task.task_key AS taskKey, task.sequence_no AS sequenceNo, task.title, task.goal, task.task_type AS taskType, task.status, task.execution_mode AS executionMode, BIN_TO_UUID(latest_run.id) AS latestTaskRunId, latest_run.status AS latestTaskRunStatus, latest_run.result_summary AS resultSummary, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( parent_task.task_key ORDER BY parent_task.sequence_no SEPARATOR ',' ) FROM task_dependency dependency JOIN task parent_task ON parent_task.id = dependency.depends_on_task_id WHERE dependency.task_id = task.id ) AS dependencyKeys, task.version FROM task LEFT JOIN task_run latest_run ON latest_run.id = ( SELECT run_candidate.id FROM task_run run_candidate WHERE run_candidate.task_id = task.id ORDER BY run_candidate.attempt_no DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE task.job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY task.sequence_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET task.status = 'READY', task.contract_json = JSON_SET( task.contract_json, '$.clarification', JSON_OBJECT( 'answer', #{answer}, 'extractedFacts', CAST(#{extractedFactsJson} AS JSON), 'answerSummary', #{answerSummary}, 'resolvedAt', DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ') ) ), task.version = task.version + 1 WHERE task.id = #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND task.job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND task.status = 'WAITING_HUMAN' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM job WHERE job.id = task.job_id AND job.status IN ('WAITING_HUMAN', 'CREATED', 'RUNNING') )

UPDATE job SET status = CASE WHEN status = 'WAITING_HUMAN' THEN 'CREATED' ELSE status END, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('WAITING_HUMAN', 'CREATED', 'RUNNING')
